GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [channel@0 ASC, id@1 ASC, returns_@3 DESC]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[channel@0 ASC, id@1 ASC, returns_@3 DESC], fetch=100
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[channel@0 as channel, id@1 as id, sum(x.sales)@3 as sales, sum(x.returns_)@4 as returns_, sum(x.profit)@5 as profit]
